Candy Boom: Candy Boom packages have bold comic-style text “BOOM” against a vibrant background. The design often features a dynamic graphical explosion theme.
Chocopie Dark: Chocopie Dark packaging features a rich brown color with prominent “Chocopie Dark” text. Often includes an image of a chocolate pie with dark filling.
Chocopie Nor: Chocopie Nor has a distinctive red packaging, prominently displaying “Chocopie” and typically featuring a snack image.
Marine Boy: Marine Boy packaging typically has a playful ocean theme, featuring nautical characters and bold marine graphics on the package.
OStar Red: O’Star Red packages are identified by their red packaging with bold “O’Star” branding. The pack often features imagery of chips.
OStar Yellow: O’Star Yellow can be recognized by its yellow package with similar branding style to O’Star Red, but in a distinct yellow color scheme.
Swing Maxx: Swing Maxx packaging is distinct with bold graphical elements and the “Swing Maxx” text, often in a striking layout.
Swing Nor: Swing Nor packaging is similar in branding style to Swing Maxx but features variations in the graphic design and text placement.
